text:
TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: MedPAR (derived) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This field is derived by accumulating the beneficiary blood deductible liability amount that is present 
on any of the claim records included in the stay (i.e., the sum of the blood deductibles reported on the 
claims that comprise the stay).
